packageMeta.packageSummary: human anchor hybrid explainer pattern. 3 AI segment(s), 2 capture task(s). ~6s total creator capture.

aiSegments.method: text-led pain point sequence with AI narration
requiredInputs: Brand copy, logo, and color palette

aiSegments.method: branded motion-card reveal using product screenshots and key messaging
requiredInputs: Product UI screenshots or app screen recordings
Finalized script or key messaging for motion graphics

aiSegments.method: UI walkthrough with AI voiceover narration
requiredInputs: Product UI screenshots or app screen recordings

taskCards.taskObjective: establish an authentic human opening beat before AI content
taskCards.exactAction: Look at the camera with an excited expression and say: Okay, real talk. I didn't think campus dating could be this easy.
taskCards.framingInstruction: chest-up, front-facing, stable camera, neutral background
retakeHints: make expression slightly stronger if it reads flat
keep energy high — this is the hook

taskCards.taskObjective: add a human CTA close after AI explanation
taskCards.exactAction: Look at the camera, smile, and say: Try it yourself — link in bio!
taskCards.framingInstruction: chest-up, front-facing, friendly expression, stable camera
retakeHints: keep the line shorter if over duration

taskSummary.summary: 2 capture task(s), ~6s total. Anchor: human open and close. Creator burden: very_low.

required: Brand copy, logo, and color palette
Product UI screenshots or app screen recordings
Finalized script or key messaging for motion graphics
firstToCollect: Product UI screenshots or app screen recordings
Brand copy, logo, and color palette

assemblyPlan.openingStrategy: human hook beat (2-3s) to establish authenticity, then transition to AI content
assemblyPlan.middleStrategy: AI-led content: text-led pain point with narration; motion-card product reveal; UI walkthrough with voiceover
assemblyPlan.compositionNotes: keep human anchor clips under 3 seconds, use consistent framing for open/close, crossfade between human and AI segments

renderSpec.renderSummary: human hook open, AI-led middle explanation, human CTA close

scenes.voiceoverText: Okay, real talk. I didn't think campus dating could be this easy.
scenes.subtitleText: Okay, real talk. I didn't think campus dating could be this easy.

scenes.voiceoverText: Finding the perfect date spot on campus is a nightmare. Between classes, clubs, and studying, who has time to plan something special?
scenes.subtitleText: Finding the perfect date spot on campus is a nightmare. Between classes, clubs, and studying, who has time to plan something special?

scenes.voiceoverText: Ditto is insane. One search, and it finds the best date ideas near you, perfectly matched to your vibe.
scenes.subtitleText: Ditto is insane. One search, and it finds the best date ideas near you, perfectly matched to your vibe.

scenes.voiceoverText: You just type it in your browser, tell Ditto what you're into, and boom — curated date plans, time slots, even reservation links. All in under 30 seconds.
scenes.subtitleText: You just type it in your browser, tell Ditto what you're into, and boom — curated date plans, time slots, even reservation links. All in under 30 seconds.
scenes.sceneNotes: use 2-3 screenshots max, keep pacing tight

scenes.voiceoverText: Try it yourself — link in bio!
scenes.subtitleText: Try it yourself — link in bio!
scenes.sceneNotes: keep under 3s; friendly energy, clear action
